meta.objective: Update documentation throughout the project to reflect the latest changes and remove documentation or files that are no longer needed.

tasks.title: Refresh and consolidate project documentation
tasks.objective: Make every maintained document accurately describe the current five-course application, its grading/evidence contracts, external experiment workflow, and verification commands while removing superseded or unreferenced documentation residue.
acceptanceCriteria: Every retained Markdown document agrees with the live course counts, routes, source-of-truth files, grading report, artifact contracts, and GitHub Pages workflow.
Superseded audits, stale task backups, and obsolete seed files are deleted only after reference and test scans establish that they have no required consumer.
README and documentation indexes give a new contributor one clear path to curriculum, grading, experiments, hosting, and validation guidance.
Documentation links and path references resolve, generated inventories/reports remain byte-current, and no active source or test references a deleted file.
npm run lint, npm test, and both GitHub Pages URL-shape verifications pass.
tasks.details: Audit README.md, root audit reports, docs/, external-executions/, public runbook mirrors, AGENTS.md repository map/counts, package scripts, tests, and all filename references. Consolidate historical results into canonical current docs, remove redundant reports/backups/seeds, and add mechanical documentation integrity coverage where useful.

validationCommands.evidence: Static build, artifact and grade verification, and 152 tests passed

validationCommands.command: NEXT_PUBLIC_BASE_PATH=/llms-from-scratch npm run build:pages && EXPECTED_PAGES_BASE_PATH=/llms-from-scratch npm run verify:pages
validationCommands.evidence: 182 canonical lessons plus 44 legacy forwards verified at project base path
Diff hygiene clean and 6 final documentation tests passed

acceptanceCheckResults.criterion: Every retained Markdown document agrees with the live course counts, routes, source-of-truth files, grading report, artifact contracts, and GitHub Pages workflow.
acceptanceCheckResults.details: Canonical docs now describe five courses, 182 lessons, 187 pages, 408 objectives, current routes, four portable accelerator contracts, and seven external execution families.

acceptanceCheckResults.criterion: Superseded audits, stale task backups, and obsolete seed files are deleted only after reference and test scans establish that they have no required consumer.
acceptanceCheckResults.details: Reference audit found one historical test consumer, which was repaired; retirement regression checks pass and the newest task safety backup remains.

acceptanceCheckResults.criterion: README and documentation indexes give a new contributor one clear path to curriculum, grading, experiments, hosting, and validation guidance.
acceptanceCheckResults.details: README.md and docs/README.md provide the current overview, ownership table, regeneration commands, and retirement policy.

acceptanceCheckResults.criterion: Documentation links and path references resolve, generated inventories/reports remain byte-current, and no active source or test references a deleted file.
acceptanceCheckResults.details: Relative-link and retired-file tests pass; verify:grades confirms all 187 generated page rows are current.

acceptanceCheckResults.criterion: npm run lint, npm test, and both GitHub Pages URL-shape verifications pass.
acceptanceCheckResults.details: Lint passed, 152 full-suite tests passed, and root plus /llms-from-scratch static exports verified.
